description: Leading French teleconsultation platform connecting patients with GPs and specialists via video. Available 7/7 with quick appointment booking.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients, reimbursed by French social security
target_market: French consumers seeking convenient access to GPs and specialists
competitive_advantage: First major telemedicine platform in France, established doctor network, 7/7 availability

varden_fit.rationale: Direct competitor in France but different positioning - Qare is B2C while Varden is B2B
